message: Fix npm OIDC publish: use Node 24 for trusted publisher support

files.patch:
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '22'
+          node-version: '24'
           registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
 
       - name: Publish to npm (OIDC)
